---
title: "07b_final_results_figures"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and result tables
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)

expr_model_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_model_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

expr_auc_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "expression_auc_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

meth_model_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_model_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

meth_auc_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_auc_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

multi_model_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "multiomic_model_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

multi_auc_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "multiomic_auc_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

clinical_model_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_model_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

clinical_auc_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_auc_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

late_integration_auc_summary <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "late_integration_auc_summary.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

dir.create(here("outputs"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "figures"), showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Add source labels
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_model_summary <- expr_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Expression")

meth_model_summary <- meth_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

multi_model_summary <- multi_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Multiomic")

clinical_model_summary <- clinical_model_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Clinical")

expr_auc_summary <- expr_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Expression")

meth_auc_summary <- meth_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Methylation")

multi_auc_summary <- multi_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Multiomic")

clinical_auc_summary <- clinical_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(data_source = "Clinical")

late_integration_auc_summary <- late_integration_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(
    data_source = "Late integration",
    model = "RandomForest"
  )
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Combine model summaries
#--------------------------------------------------

all_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  clinical_model_summary,
  expr_model_summary,
  meth_model_summary,
  multi_model_summary
)

all_auc_summary <- bind_rows(
  clinical_auc_summary,
  expr_auc_summary,
  meth_auc_summary,
  multi_auc_summary,
  late_integration_auc_summary
)

print(all_model_summary)
print(all_auc_summary)

write_csv(
  all_model_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "all_model_summary_extended.csv")
)

write_csv(
  all_auc_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "all_auc_summary_extended.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Create final comparison table
#--------------------------------------------------

final_comparison_extended <- all_model_summary %>%
  select(data_source, model, ROC, Sens, Spec, ROCSD, SensSD, SpecSD) %>%
  left_join(
    all_auc_summary,
    by = c("data_source", "model")
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  bind_rows(
    late_integration_auc_summary %>%
      transmute(
        data_source,
        model,
        ROC = NA_real_,
        Sens = NA_real_,
        Spec = NA_real_,
        ROCSD = NA_real_,
        SensSD = NA_real_,
        SpecSD = NA_real_,
        auc
      )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(auc))

print(final_comparison_extended)

write_csv(
  final_comparison_extended,
  here("outputs", "tables", "final_model_comparison_extended.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Cleaner display table for report
#--------------------------------------------------

report_table <- final_comparison_extended %>%
  mutate(
    ROC = round(ROC, 3),
    Sens = round(Sens, 3),
    Spec = round(Spec, 3),
    auc = round(auc, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(
    data_source,
    model,
    auc,
    ROC,
    Sens,
    Spec
  )

print(report_table)

write_csv(
  report_table,
  here("outputs", "tables", "report_model_table.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Set display order for plotting
#--------------------------------------------------

all_auc_summary <- all_auc_summary %>%
  mutate(
    data_source = factor(
      data_source,
      levels = c("Clinical", "Expression", "Methylation", "Multiomic", "Late integration")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. AUC comparison bar chart
#--------------------------------------------------

p_auc <- all_auc_summary %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = data_source, y = auc, fill = model)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Cross-validated AUC by data source and model",
    x = "Data source",
    y = "AUC"
  )

print(p_auc)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "auc_comparison_extended.png"),
  plot = p_auc,
  width = 9,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Best-model-only plot
#--------------------------------------------------

best_models <- all_auc_summary %>%
  group_by(data_source) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = auc, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

p_best_auc <- best_models %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = data_source, y = auc, fill = data_source)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Best AUC achieved within each data source",
    x = "Data source",
    y = "AUC"
  ) +
  guides(fill = "none")

print(p_best_auc)

ggsave(
  here("outputs", "figures", "best_auc_by_data_source.png"),
  plot = p_best_auc,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. Best overall model summary
#--------------------------------------------------

best_overall <- final_comparison_extended %>%
  slice_max(order_by = auc, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE)

print(best_overall)

write_csv(
  best_overall,
  here("outputs", "tables", "best_overall_models.csv")
)
```
